title: T-117 — Schema: settings flag `require_grn_qc_inspection` (placeholder for 09-QUALITY)
prompt:
Add a tenant-scoped settings flag `require_grn_qc_inspection` (boolean, default false) to the Settings module. When true, downstream Warehouse GRN completion will require QA sign-off before LP state transitions to `available`. The full enforcement flow lives in 09-QUALITY (out of scope here) — this task only persists the flag + exposes a typed accessor.

Deliverable:
- Extend the existing `tenant_settings` (or `module_flags` / `settings_flags`, whichever is canonical — verify by reading existing 02-SETTINGS schema) to include `require_grn_qc_inspection BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false`. If a generic key/value flags table exists, instead seed a default row with key='require_grn_qc_inspection' and a typed getter.
- Add a typed accessor `getRequireGrnQcInspection(tenantId)` in `packages/domain/src/settings/grn-qc.ts` returning `boolean`, reading via withOrgContext.
- Migration: `0117_settings_require_grn_qc_inspection.sql`.
- Document the placeholder contract in JSDoc: 'Consumed by 05-WAREHOUSE GRN action when 09-QUALITY ships; today the flag is read but enforcement is no-op.'

RED tests:
- Schema-shape test: column or seeded flag row exists with correct default.
- Accessor test: returns false when no override; returns true after a tenant override.

Do NOT implement GRN-side enforcement (that lives in 09-QUALITY tasks). Do NOT add UI in this task — UI in T-118.

Close-out: paste migration filename + vitest output + accessor signature.

pipeline_inputs.description: Add require_grn_qc_inspection flag in settings + typed accessor (placeholder for 09-QUALITY).
pipeline_inputs.details: Verify canonical flags storage (tenant_settings vs module_flags) before deciding on column-add vs seeded row. Accessor wraps withOrgContext. Document placeholder contract.
acceptance_criteria: Given the migration is applied, when the flag is queried for an unconfigured tenant, then it defaults to false.
Given a tenant sets the flag to true, when getRequireGrnQcInspection runs, then it returns true.
Given `pnpm vitest run packages/domain/src/settings/__tests__/grn-qc.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
Given `pnpm tsc --noEmit`, when run, then 0 errors.
test_strategy: RED schema-shape test asserting flag presence + default false.
RED accessor test for default and override paths.
Run `pnpm vitest run` for new test file.
risk_red_lines: Do not enforce the flag in any GRN-side code path — that is 09-QUALITY scope.
Do not break existing settings migrations.
